content:
3 min read
Just now

--

A few months ago, I thought I had finally found my path.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

AI was everywhere.
Every day I saw people talking about AI agencies, AI consulting, AI audits, and automation businesses. It seemed like everyone had discovered a golden opportunity.
So I did what many people would do.
I followed the crowd.
I started learning everything I could about AI audits. I watched videos, took notes, researched tools, and worked on offers.
From the outside, it looked like progress.
But there was one problem.
Something didn’t feel right.
At first, I ignored it.
I told myself:
“Maybe I just need more confidence.”
“Maybe I need more experience.”
“Maybe I need to push harder.”
So I kept going.
But the harder I pushed, the heavier it felt.
Every time I thought about sales calls, networking events, outreach messages, or discovery calls, my energy disappeared.
I wasn’t excited.
I was exhausted.
